# llms.txt — lafa.codes
# See: https://llmstxt.org/

> This is the personal portfolio of Roshan Thapa (lafa.codes_).

## About

Roshan Thapa is a Software Engineer specializing in AI, Automation, and Software Security. He builds intelligent, secure systems and ships products that matter. He is passionate about turning ambitious ideas into real-world solutions.

## Focus Areas

- **Artificial Intelligence**: Building intelligent systems with LLMs, ML pipelines, and AI agents that augment human capability and automate decision-making.
- **Automation**: Designing workflows and systems that eliminate repetitive work — CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and smart orchestration.
- **Software Security**: Baking security into every layer — threat modeling, secure code practices, penetration testing, and zero-trust architectures.
- **Innovation & Products**: From zero to one — prototyping, validating, and shipping new products.

## Tech Stack

Python, TypeScript, React, Node.js, C#/.NET, Flutter, Docker, AWS, Azure, LLMs, CI/CD
